items.title: Is UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Pricing Reflect Its Value After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
items.description: If you are wondering whether UnitedHealth Group's current share price really reflects what the business is worth, you are not alone. The stock last closed at US$331.02, with returns of 2.8% decline over 7 days, a 1.1% gain over 30 days, a 1.6% decline year to date, a 33.5% decline over 1 year, a 28.0% decline over 3 years, and a 3.3% gain over 5 years. These moves have many investors reassessing both risk and potential reward. Recent news around UnitedHealth Group has focused on ongoing...

items.title: Congresswoman Violates STOCK Act With Over 200 Late Trade Disclosures: Purchases Include Mag7, Healthcare Stocks
items.description: Rep. Julia Letlow (R-La.) reportedly violated a federal transparency law by failing to disclose her personal stock trades within the required time frame. Lawmaker Missed STOCK Act Trade Filings Letlow, a third-term Louisiana congresswoman, failed to disclose 224 stock and bond trades within the 45-day reporting window required under the Stop Trading on Congressional Knowledge (STOCK) Act, reported NOTUS on Thursday.
